query: Sony Days of Play 2026 May PS Plus subscription deals announced
answer:

# Sony Days of Play 2026 – PS Plus Subscription Deals & Full Event Details

## Key Finding: Not Yet Officially Announced (as of May 21, 2026)

As of May 21, 2026, Sony has **not yet officially announced** the Days of Play 2026 sale or its specific PS Plus subscription deals. The official PlayStation Days of Play page (playstation.com/en-us/deals/days-of-play/) currently shows only a "Days of Play will return... Stay tuned" placeholder message. However, **highly reliable leaks from billbil-kun via Dealabs** — who has proven consistently accurate on past PlayStation promotions — have revealed extensive details about the upcoming event.

The official announcement is expected on **May 26, 2026**, one day before the sale begins.

## Leaked Event Dates

- **Start date:** May 27, 2026 (Wednesday)
- **End date:** June 10, 2026 (Tuesday)
- **Duration:** Two weeks (consistent with past years; Days of Play 2025 ran May 28–June 11)
- A **State of Play** presentation is scheduled for June 2, falling in the middle of the event, with 60+ minutes of announcements including an extended look at Marvel's Wolverine.

## PS Plus Subscription Deals – What's Known

### Specific PS Plus Discount Details for 2026: Not Yet Leaked
The billbil-kun leak, which is the primary source for Days of Play 2026 details, **has not yet revealed specific PS Plus subscription discount percentages or prices** for the 2026 event. Multiple outlets (PlayStation LifeStyle, gg.deals, G3Geek, Archynewsy) confirm that PS Plus subscription discounts are **expected** as part of the promotion, but exact figures have not been disclosed.

### Historical PS Plus Days of Play Discounts (for context)
- **Days of Play 2025:** Up to **33% off** select 12-month PS Plus plans (specifically the Premium annual plan)
- **Days of Play 2024:** **25% off** PS Plus Extra annual plan; **30% off** PS Plus Premium annual plan
- **Days of Play 2025 (Norway page, still live):** Explicitly advertised "Save up to 33% on select 12-month PlayStation Plus plans"

### PS Plus Subscriber Perk During Days of Play
- PS Plus subscribers will receive an **additional 5% discount** on PlayStation Direct store purchases, which can be **stacked** with other Days of Play deals.

### Important Context: Recent PS Plus Price Increases
Complicating the picture, Sony announced on **May 18, 2026** that PS Plus subscription prices would increase in select regions effective **May 20, 2026** — just one week before the Days of Play sale begins:

| Tier | Duration | New Price (USD) | New Price (EUR) | New Price (GBP) | Change (USD) |
|------|----------|----------------|----------------|----------------|--------------|
| Essential | 1 month | $10.99 | €9.99 | £7.99 | +$1.00 |
| Essential | 3 months | $27.99 | €27.99 | £21.99 | +$3.00 |
| Essential | 12 months | Unchanged | Unchanged | Unchanged | $0.00 |

- Only **new subscribers** are affected (existing auto-renewing subscribers keep current rates, except in Turkey and India).
- Annual plan prices were **not** increased — widely interpreted as a strategy to lock users into long-term commitments, especially ahead of GTA 6's expected November 2026 launch.

### Current Standard PS Plus Annual Prices (UK, for reference)
- Essential: £59.99/year
- Extra: £99.99/year
- Premium: £119.99/year

## Other Leaked Days of Play 2026 Deals

### Accessories
| Product | Sale Price (EUR) | Regular Price (EUR) | Discount |
|---------|-----------------|--------------------|---------| 
| DualSense Controller | €54.99 | ~€74.99 | ~€20 off |
| DualSense Edge Controller | €189.99 | €219.99 | €30 off |
| PSVR2 Headset | €349.99 | €449.99 | €100 off |
| Pulse Elite Headset | ~€20 off | — | €20 off |
| Pulse Explore Earbuds | ~€20 off | — | €20 off |

### Games
- **Ghost of Yōtei:** €54.99 (down from €79.99, ~31% off)
- A large PS Store digital sale is expected with discounts on first-party and third-party titles

### Notable Absences
- **No PS5 console discounts** are currently expected (PS5, PS5 Pro, and PS Portal reportedly excluded from promotions), following Sony's April 2026 console price increases (PS5 now €649.99, PS5 Pro at €899.99/$900)

## Assessment of Announcement Status

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| Official Sony announcement of Days of Play 2026 | **Not yet** (expected May 26) |
| Days of Play dates leaked | **Yes** – May 27 to June 10 |
| PS Plus subscription discount specifics | **Not yet leaked or announced** |
| PS Plus subscription discounts expected | **Yes** – historically always included |
| Expected PS Plus discount range (based on history) | **25–33% off 12-month plans** |
| Accessory & game deals leaked | **Yes** – detailed above |

## Sources Consulted
- PlayStation.com official Days of Play page
- Insider Gaming (May 20, 2026)
- Push Square (May 20, 2026)
- Twisted Voxel (May 20, 2026)
- gg.deals (May 20, 2026)

- Notebookcheck (May 20, 2026)

- La Razón (May 12, 2026)
- The Verge (May 18, 2026)
- GamesRadar+ (May 2026)
- Dealabs / billbil-kun (primary leak source)

key_facts: Sony has NOT yet officially announced Days of Play 2026 as of May 21, 2026; the official announcement is expected on May 26, 2026
Reliable leaker billbil-kun (via Dealabs) has leaked that Days of Play 2026 will run from May 27 to June 10, 2026 (two weeks)
Specific PS Plus subscription discount percentages for Days of Play 2026 have NOT been leaked or announced yet
PS Plus subscription discounts are expected based on historical precedent: Days of Play 2025 offered up to 33% off 12-month plans, and 2024 offered 25-30% off annual plans
PS Plus subscribers will get an additional 5% discount on PlayStation Direct store purchases during the event, stackable with other Days of Play deals
Sony raised PS Plus monthly ($10.99) and quarterly ($27.99) subscription prices effective May 20, 2026, but kept annual prices unchanged
The price increases apply only to new subscribers; existing auto-renewing subscribers keep current rates (except Turkey and India)
No PS5 console discounts are expected during Days of Play 2026, following Sony's April 2026 console price increases
Leaked accessory deals include: DualSense at €54.99 (€20 off), DualSense Edge at €189.99 (€30 off), PSVR2 at €349.99 (€100 off)
Ghost of Yōtei expected at €54.99 (down from €79.99, ~31% off)
A PlayStation State of Play is scheduled for June 2, 2026, during the Days of Play event window
The official PlayStation Days of Play webpage has been updated with a 2026 title but only shows a 'stay tuned' placeholder
